Pacific Heliport Services

a subsidiary of Helijet International Inc.

Ms Aleks Powell
Pacific Heliport Services
apowell [at] helijet.it.com *
+1.604.767.8452
*Please note: donation requests for Helijet are not accepted on the above Pacific Heliport contacts.
Visit Helijet Community Support for information on how to submit your request.

In our ongoing mission to maintain the highest safety and operating standards of  heliports in Canada, Pacific Heliport Services aims to provide a level of service exceeding our customers expectations.

Pacific Heliport Services operates and manages heliports in:[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” Victoria Harbour Heliport

79 Dallas Road
Victoria, BC V8V 1A1
Cargo & Heliport Information: +1.250.386.7676
Helijet Reservations: 1.800.665.4354
Fax: 250.360.2305

Station Contact: Ms Aleks Powell
apowell [at] helijet.it.com

Hours of Operation

Monday through Friday – 0630 to 1930
Saturdays & Sundays – 0700 to 1815
Statutory Holidays – 0700 to 1815
December 25 – Closed
Operations after hours without prior written approval is not permitted. If operations are conducted they will be completely at the operators’ own risk.

Ramp Services and Rates

Fees are as per Victoria Harbour (Public) Heliport Tariff Schedule. Dated October 15, 2024.
The following rates are subject to change and do not include applicable taxes.
Landing Fees (includes 60 minutes of aircraft parking)

Rate Effective from December 1, 2024

Aircraft Type: Fee:
Group A aircraft (43′ or less) $105
Group B aircraft (44′ to 58′) $165
Group C aircraft (58′ to 80′) $255

Helicopter Parking

Itinerant (non-scheduled) use (landing, parking, fueling) by prior permission only.
Scheduled use by Facility Use Agreement with Pacific Heliport Services Ltd.

Rate Effective December 1, 2024
0701 hours to 1959 hours $25.00/15 minute interval or portion thereof
2000 hours to 0700 hours $150.00 overnight

Note:
For overnight parking, there is no security in place at Heliport other than perimeter fence. Air Operators/Owners of aircraft are at their sole risk for liability and damage to their aircraft.

Tariffs based on less than 100 landings per month.
Discounts available for more than 100 landings

Fuel (Jet A)

Fuel at Victoria Harbour Heliport is sole property of Helijet International Inc., who has granted Pacific Heliport Services permission to provide third party fuel on the following conditions:

  • Fueling available with prior permission or emergency basis only.
  • Itinerant aircraft may have to wait for fuel as scheduled service requirements take precedence.
  • Fuel available to itinerant aircraft is dependent upon the storage levels and needs of the scheduled service.

Itinerant aircraft should be aware that due to the above reasons they might only receive enough fuel to reach Victoria International Airport for full refuelling.

Passenger Services

In conjunction with Helijet, the Victoria Harbour Heliport offers the following services:

  • Passenger Waiting Area.
  • Helijet Passenger Service and Ramp Service agents are available to assist passengers and pilots.
  • Various ground transportation options are available.

Parking for the Victoria Heliport is available in the adjacent Robbins Parking lot (#214) for $14.00/24 hours, $11.00/12 hours or $3.00/hour.

Complimentary parking (maximum 5 days) is included with the purchase of a confirmed roundtrip Helijet ticket. To qualify, park in marked Helijet spots and register your vehicle at the terminal check-in
Note: lot is patrolled by Robbins Parking on a regular basis. Parking fines apply for, cars not parked in Helijet designated spots, and expired tickets.

[/vc_column_text][/tab][tab icon_family=”none” title=”Vancouver” id=”1777659362502-6″ tab_id=”1777659362503-4″][image_with_animation image_url=”897″ image_size=”full” max_width=”100%” max_width_mobile=”default” animation_type=”entrance” animation=”Fade In” animation_easing=”default” animation_movement_type=”transform_y” hover_animation=”none” alignment=”center” border_radius=”none” box_shadow=”none” image_loading=”default”][divider line_type=”No Line”][vc_column_text css=”” text_direction=”default”]

Vancouver Harbour Heliport

Operated by Pacific Heliport Services
455 West Waterfront Road
Vancouver, BC V6B 5E8

Cargo & Heliport Information: +1.604.688.4646
Helijet Reservations: 1.800.665.4354
Fax: 604.682.1478
Heliport Email: vancargo [at] helijet.it.com

Station Contact: Ms Aleks Powell
apowell [at] helijet.it.com

VHF radio: 122.35 Mhz

Hours of Operation

Monday through Friday – 06:30 to 19:30
Saturdays & Sundays – 07:00 to 19:00
Statutory Holidays – 07:00 to 19:00
December 25  – Closed

Operations after hours without prior written approval is not permitted. If operations are conducted they will be completely at the operators’ own risk.

Heliport Users, please take note of the Policies and Protocols for Vancouver Harbour Heliport

Ramp Services and Rates

Fees are as per Vancouver Harbour (Public) Heliport Tariff Schedule dated October 15, 2024.
The following rates are subject to change and do not include applicable taxes.
Landing Fees (includes 60 minutes of aircraft parking)

Rate Effective December 1, 2024

Aircraft Type: Fee:
Group A aircraft (43′ or less) $105
Group B aircraft (44′ to 58′) $165
Group C aircraft (58′ to 80′) $255
Group D aircraft (80′ + ) $480

Helicopter Parking

Rate Effective December 1, 2024
Group A, B & C aircraft:

0701 hours to 1959 hours: $25.00/15 minute interval or portion thereof
2000 hours to 0700 hours: $150.00 overnight

Group D aircraft:

0701 hours to 1959 hours: $45.00/15 minute interval or portion thereof
2000 hours to 0700 hours: $250.00 overnight

Note:
For overnight parking, monitored cameras and a perimeter fence are in place but there are no security personnel at the Heliport.  Air Operators/Owners of aircraft are at their sole risk for liability and damage to their aircraft.

Tariffs based on less than 100 landings/month.
Discounts may apply for more than 100 landings.

 

Fuel (Jet A)

Available at current market rate

Passenger Services

In conjunction with Helijet, the Vancouver Harbour Heliport offers the following services:

  • Passenger Waiting Area.
  • Helijet Passenger Service and Ramp Service agents are available to assist passengers and pilots.
  • Various ground transportation options are available.
  • Secure gated vehicle parking, managed by Platinum Parking, is available for $25.00/overnight (until noon the following day) or $4.00/hour plus taxes and fees via the HONK app or scanning the QR code on parking signs

Complimentary parking (maximum 5 days), managed by Platinum Parking, is included with the purchase of a confirmed roundtrip Helijet ticket. Vehicles must be registered at check-in, unregistered vehicles may be towed. Parking lot is locked every evening, after the last flight arrival, and is NOT accessible after-hours.[/vc_column_text][/tab][tab icon_family=”none” title=”Nanaimo” id=”1777659362527-5″ tab_id=”1777659362527-2″][vc_column_text text_direction=”default”]

Nanaimo Harbour Heliport at the Cruise Ship Welcome Centre

100 Port Drive
Nanaimo, BC V9R 0C7

Nanaimo Harbour Heliport is a private use facility, therefore prior permission is required for landing.
No fuel services are available at Nanaimo Heliport
Requests will be accommodated on a space available basis.

Please contact Heliport, Station Contact, : Ms Aleks Powell
apowell [at] helijet.it.com

Hours of Operation

Monday through Friday – 0700 to 1830
Saturdays & Sundays – 0730 to 1830
Statutory Holidays – 0730 to 1830
December 25 – Closed
Operations after hours are not permitted.

Food and beverage services are provided for Helijet guests.
Complimentary parking (maximum 5 days) is included with the purchase of a confirmed roundtrip Helijet ticket. To qualify, park in marked Helijet spots and register your vehicle at the terminal check-in, unregistered vehicles may be ticketed and towed
Parking at adjacent Nanaimo Port Authority is available in the adjacent Robbins Parking lot for $14.00/24 hrs (maximum 4 days), $12.00/6 hours or $2.00/hour.  Parking lot is monitored by Robbins Parking, unregistered vehicles may be ticketed and towed.[/vc_column_text][/tab][/tabbed_section][/vc_column][vc_column column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” flex_gap_desktop=”10px” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” column_position=”default” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/6″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][/vc_column][/vc_row]
